publishedAbstract: - With OpenShift 3.11 it was announced that [Red Hat Cloudforms OpenShift Provider and Podified CFME](https://docs.openshift.com/container-platform/3.11/release_notes/ocp_3_11_release_notes.html) would be replaced by Prometheus.- What does this mean for Red Hat Cloudforms customers that use Cloudforms to manage OpenShift environments?
publishedTitle: Future Plans for Cloudforms and OpenShift
